description: A configured transaction/reporting currency master. One currency is flagged base; every money amount across the model is normalized to that base via the FX service so thresholds, comparison, and analytics are computed on one comparable figure. The base is chosen explicitly per tenant (never hard-coded) and locks once any transaction exists.

fields.name: isoCode
fields.label: Currency Code
fields.validation: 3-letter ISO 4217 code (USD, EUR, INR, AED, OMR, SAR, CHF, ...); uppercase; natural primary key; unique; immutable
fields.purpose: The natural key every money field references as its transaction currency; the stable code the FX service uses to fetch a rate and that links a transaction amount to its denomination end to end.

fields.name: name
fields.label: Currency Name
fields.validation: non-blank; e.g. US Dollar, Omani Rial
fields.purpose: The human-readable label shown in currency dropdowns so users pick a currency by name rather than memorizing ISO codes.

fields.name: symbol
fields.label: Symbol
fields.validation: short glyph e.g. $, INR, OMR; informational
fields.purpose: The display glyph prefixed to money amounts in the UI so figures read naturally; presentation only, never used in calculation.

fields.name: isBase
fields.label: Base Currency
fields.validation: exactly one currency true per tenant; chosen explicitly with no hard-coded default; locked once any transaction exists
fields.purpose: Marks the single reporting currency convertToBase normalizes every amount to (axiom A12); the base/null short-circuit returns amounts in this currency unchanged with no FX call. The reference point for all thresholds, comparison, and analytics.

fields.name: decimals
fields.label: Decimal Places
fields.purpose: The precision money amounts in this currency round and display to; conversion rounds to 2dp by default but a 3-decimal currency (OMR) needs its own scale so amounts are not silently truncated.

fields.name: status
fields.label: Status
fields.validation: INACTIVE not selectable on new transactions; the base currency cannot be set INACTIVE
fields.purpose: Lets an admin retire a currency from new use without deleting historical transactions denominated in it.

invariants: A12 all amounts normalized to the single base currency via the FX service; conversion never throws (graceful degradation to original)
A13 audit + SSE on every committed master change
